title: BambooToolCrafting
description:
You can now use sticks AND bamboos to craft tools,
BambooToolTexture resource-pack adds custom textures.
body:
## BambooToolCrafting

This datapack adds a set of crafting recipes for various tools, you can use Bamboos :). Great pack for Bamboo useage and BambooToolTexture adds textures for these recipes (NOT INCLUDED IN THIS DATAPACK).

### Recommended Resource Pack

For the full experience, we highly recommend using the **BambooToolTexture** resource pack. It adds custom textures for all the tools included in this datapack, making your Bamboo tools look like they're actually made of Bamboo! Using multiple recipe datapacks at the same time requires MoreToolTexture resource pack.

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/583a4331887b42c5be918a0c895f0561824959c8.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bambootoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980e1fe6ed0c05b6a3175940fcaada51245fc12d.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bambootooltexture)

##                                Click the image to go to the respective page :)
 ###                                         Recipe = Data-Pack                                 Item = Resource-Pack

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a773331e696b289b9cd56eaf8177ee908bf914a4.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethysttoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f32fe48cd7b932dd1148fab26bbfc6238665bdee.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethysttooltexture)       [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00e59671d5ff9322aeeaa0fed655070d1f0815eb.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/echotoolcrafting)[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1daa1baf2a3849ce41a70c51a2bc659f350b6229.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/echotooltexture)       [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f93bb7e0308c3b5d8a6ca550ed3505ff13bd15a.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/moretooltexture)

    * Copper Sword

    * Diamond Pickaxe
    * Diamond Shovel

    * Golden Shovel

    * Stone Axe

    * Wooden Axe

    * Wooden Pickaxe
    * Wooden Shovel
    * Wooden Sword

    * Carrot on a Stick
